reviews.review_text:
We came here for an overnight camping trip as a suprise for my husband's birthday and it was magical.

The pool is warm (perfect for cooler nights), the slides are ridiculously fun, theres a play ground, go karts, a pontoon on the creek (great for crabbing).

We had such a fantastic time and will be making this our regular family camping spot due to it's location and family-friendliness.

The facilities have kitchen, hot showers, toilets, rubbish, communal camp fire, food trucks (great for morning coffee),  restaurants (wasn't open when we came).
The staff have been amazing, looking after me during this very wet period of my week long stay.
So far so good
Lovely site, heated pool and 3 camp kitchens. Clean, modern facilities best site we stayed in
非常棒的营地 路面硬化度高 尘土很少 泳池很棒 餐厅好吃 还有送餐服务 camping和glamping体验都非常满意 一个月来玩了两次 还会再来
Nice tidy new park with great facilities, staff were awesome.
No unpowered camping next to river anymore. Under development apparently.

The area is nice, some things for kids to do. Shame the service around the area, with how staff treat guests is horrible. Not enough seating areas around the pool/playground area, abused if you sit in their eating area (even if you purchase food from them) Surcharge of 15% on any product purchased over a weekend. For nearly $200 a night I would expect staff to be a bit friendlier

We have had two visits to Rivershore. Our first visit we stayed in one of the Glamping tents and we absolutely loved it. They are spacious and have everything you need and they come with a Webber BBQ on the large deck which is also handy.

Our more recent visit last week was on a powered site in our caravan. We arrived and were placed on a “ Deluxe site” right next to all the works that are currently taking place. This actually didn’t bother me but a little communication / being advised at the time of booking / check in that we were going to be right next to noisy works would have been appreciated.

Our stay was during the school holidays so of course we are aware how busy etc it would be. They do need to be on top of how chaotic the pool is with the slides. We totally get it that kids are having fun but it is an accident waiting to happen. You have a staff member sometimes two at the top of the slides ( i am assuming to monitor the slides and let the next person know when they are safe to go) however this never occurred, the girls were spending more time on their phones rather than monitoring the safety. I had to take it upon myself so many times to ask the kids behind me to please wait until both myself and 2 year son were clear from the slide before flying down. Even after this it still didn’t happen and the amount of times we got hit after hitting the water by another kid was ridiculous.

The next issue they need to sort is the steps within the pool. They are the same colour as the actual pool and the amount of people either tripping or slipping off them in the pool was ridiculous. I know from our trip we aren’t the only ones unhappy with that. My partner knocked her legs many times and has been left with a number of proper bruises. All is required is to put a yellow line or some sort to show where the steps are. It is a simple safety hazard.

The female toilets had no hand soap for 3 days. This was fixed after sending a text message to the park asking for it to be fixed.

My last complaint here is probably one that needs to be addressed ASAP. The majority of the staff are so rude and just not interested. I absolutely hate to do this but one staff member in particular… HELEN, you need to be removed from the front reception. The way you speak to your guests and even kids is just not acceptable.

I enquired one evening about the advertised kids DISCO for my kids. You advised me it is not happening because the speaker was broken. Two nights later i enquired again and you told me “ read the sign, if its advertised then its on”  My reply to you was that i was advertised the other night and you cancelled because the speaker was broken and your reply was “ i think its fixed but I don’t really care as it is not me doing the disco tonight” … little things as simple as a disco is what some of the kids would actually really enjoy and yes the disco was on the second night but it isn’t much of a disco when you just place a speaker in the smallest corner.

The kids activities need to be better. So much potential but unfortunately the staff just have no interest. You pay good money to stay there in school holidays so you would at least expect some enthusiasm from the staff.

All in all not a bad park, just needs better staff and better improvements which can make the park a very good one.

Much better parks around though so do your research before booking this one.

Such a great spot for young families! My family of 4 spent 2 nights in one of the glamping tents, which were really nice.

Pros: Beautiful spot next to the river, great pool and slides, nice place to have a drink overlooking the pool, the hired karts were really fun and we enjoyed the free mini-golf too. Glamping tents were lovely with all amenities needed. Everyone really friendly and such a great atmosphere.

Cons:  Glamping tents very expensive and beds not very comfy, food limited at the cafe, with breakfast only served on weekends. Didn't sleep well due to sun pouring directly onto our faces in the main bed, and the campsite is quite noisy.

Overall, I would highly recommend a visit, especially for families with children  between 4-12 years. Lots to do!

So easy to get to. Reservations were easy.
Facilities are excellent. So much included. Pool was large and had slides. There are daily activities, such as archery, soccer games, movie nights, children's disco and animal encounters all included.
Glamping tent was huge with massive bathroom which included a bath. Beds were very comfortable. Outdoor settings and bar-b-que area are adjoined to the tent. Views are wonderful on the river, fishing spots all along.
Recommended!

We recently stayed in the Safari family tent. Absolutely stunning location, right next to the river. Beautiful big grassy area directly in front of our tent, ideal for the kids to play.

Beautiful spotless tent, huge king bed and 2 single (1 mattress for 3rd child set up!) in a separate curtained room.
Kitchenette ideal and included everything you need.
Bathroom is great, cute bath and great water pressure on the shower!
Deck and bbq area fab! Could’ve used a sink outside to clean the bbq but we made it work!
Cannot fault the accommodation in any way!

Activities for the kids to do, snake show, archery, wildlife show, disco, colouring competition, scavenger hunt - all at absolutely no extra cost!

Fire Pitt was such a good touch for roasting marshmallows!

Jumping pillow and putt putt we didn’t use as there was no shade in these areas for the kids.

Communal toilets and laundry - spotless

Play area - sand floor and shade made it perfect for the kids!

The pool area is amazing, clean, non stop fun on the 2 water slides for the kids, splash pool for the younger ones, shallow and deep areas in the big pool.

The only fault - I wish it wasn’t as this place had been faultless until the last few afternoons.

The pool, including sun loungers, cabana’s and play area can all be accessed by day guests for a fee (identified by a different wrist band to overnight guests) Being the Easter holidays the park is already full to the brim with the excited kids using the pool areas. The day guests, including big groups for birthday parties took over all the cabanas, loungers and filled the pool to the point of it being too busy and dangerous for our 3 young children. Unfortunately the parents of many of the older children (8+) were utilising the bar/cafe and not supervising their children. Bad language, wrestling with floaties, pushing and running were witnessed by our children, we also lost 2 floaties with kids just taking them! We had to pack up and leave the pool area on 2 occasions. When you are paying $580 a night, I feel it’s not good enough to have to leave because of day guests who have entered for a $20 fee.

We would return because the location and accommodation is amazing, we just would have reservations because of how crazy busy the pool area and seating became.

We stayed in the “Tradewind” Airstream caravan and were really excited for the novelty and “cool” factor of the experience. While it definitely has charm, the van itself feels quite dated and only partially renovated.
That said, it does include all the basic comforts you’d need—hot and cold running water, air conditioning, 240V power points, a TV, microwave, and a gas oven—so it’s still functional for a comfortable stay.
The highlight for us was the park itself. It’s a lovely place to stay, with amenities that feel relatively new and are generally kept clean—even during busy periods. We visited over the Easter weekend, and despite the crowds, the facilities were impressively well maintained.
Overall, a unique stay with a great location, but the Airstream could benefit from a more complete refresh.

Gorgeous location, amazing facilities and the staff are fantastic. My kids had the best time. Water slides for the big kids and splash pool for the littles. Playground, fire pits, fishing, pedal bikes and top tier service. It is also only about 15mins from tourist activities such as the big pineapple and sealife aquarium.

this was a lovely place for us, all friendly people, very helpful staff. all amenities where spotless, fresh and clean. lots to do for the kids, great pool and excellent food in the restaurant. we have to move on further up to Cairns, but we could easy stay another couple of days.
Great place if you have kids with plenty of activities for the  and the pool is great for everyone, love the bar and other activities that the park arranges and keeps you informed about
Well maintained clean site with excellent amenities. Highly recommend!

Currently staying and the facilities and staff are fantastic.

The ladies on reception were a delight to deal with

- very nice caravan park to stay for a few days or longer
- good location for day trips to surrounding locations
- nice food, good drinks
- clean pool with cool slides
- very helpful and lovely staff

Wow what a fantastic place, from the moment we booked in, so friendly, accomodation, amenities was spot on. Pool was so much fun for all the kids and adults. Went out of there way to accommodate my daughter and grandies while we had torrential rain.
Amazing holiday! Staff were super friendly and helpful! Perfect location. We had the family safari tent was a great size and was very clean. Will definitely be returning for another great holiday.

Stayed here last night. What a fantastic place. Everything about this is just spot on. The sites - lots of choice from off grid on the riverfront to luxury glamping and everything g in between. The pool with slides and a toddler pool - amazing! The facilitate clean and well thought out. Ample of everything - amenities, kitchens, bins, etc. The cafe/restaurant has great food and food & drinks are reasonably priced.   The staff are friendly and on the ball.
In all, highly recommend.
Craig was the best at both our stays nearly a year apart. His energetic, warm energy made it such a great time. The kids will never forget their favourite bar man .

Absolute paradise for families. A great location by a lake good for fishing, stunning views of sunsets and sunrise. Slides are free and are great fun! The service is top tier. Fun activities such as pedal karts, mini golf and petting zoo. The facilities inside the glamp are extremely comfy and premium. There are 3 beds, a bath, and a barbecue. There is a fireplace, perfect for toasting marshmallows and more. One of the best holiday parks ever!
Rivershore was a great place to camp. The pool, restraunt and bar is fantastic. The kids loved the pool and slides, mini golf, jumping pillow and the movie nights. Would definitely come back again.

Stayed on a powered site in a tent and was immediately taken aback by the fact we were literally right next to a very busy road. It was hard to sleep at night and we were woken by the sounds of traffic in the early hours.
The amenities were good and the kids really enjoyed the pool. Reception could benefit from being warmer - I felt like a huge bother to them by asking some simple questions.

Great little place. Good pool for kids. Bar service slow (got our food before the drinks arrived).
Good spot :)

We've stayed at another Ingenia site and it was not the same experience. We stayed here for 6 nights in a Safari tent (glamping). For the amount we paid approx ($2,800) for a tent, it was not best value for money.

Pros:
- Location
- Nice river view
- Nice pool with slides for kids
- Little to no mosquito's

Cons:
- Tent needed a bit more servicing given we stayed for 6 days
- VERY noisy at night time with kids running around well past 9pm and adults having loud conversations on thier balconies. The tents are built very close on either sides.
- We flew in from Sydney, so relying on a well sourced kitchen for utensils was key for cooking on a bbq. We needed to purchase a frypan as the grill did not have a flat hotplate. We could not use the common BBQ due to food allergies.
- Children running and riding around without supervision at all hours (not the fault of Ingenia), its a serious issue, when trying to navigate in a car to your tent at 10 kph and having to stop to ensure kids are not being run over.
- The tent needed a DEEP clean, the floor felt grimey from day 1. My Husband found a pair of undies behind the TV unit which tells me cleaning is not to standard (refer photo).
- The front reception staff could be a bit more welcoming and informative.

Absolutely loved camping with my family last weekend.  Great location. Riverfront access, ideal for fishing. Swimming Pool and waterslides were a huge hit. Great location for a perfect family weekend away. Highly recommend 👌

We stayed here over Christmas week 2025. It was our first time at the park and couldn't have been more pleased with our stay. The staff were so lovely and thoughtful. We booked a powered site for our 9m caravan and the site was huge. Could have fit another caravan and car on it. Facilities were amazing for the kids with a full school holiday planner of activities. Everything was well cleaned and serviced, down to the wheely bins being emptied regular so no smell. We compared it to being on a cruise ship, the only thing missing was the kids club 😊 Will definitely be back to this park 10/10
The staff were amazing and they went above and beyond to make our stay nice and joyful.

Positiiviset:
- Lapsiystävällinen ja viihtyisä paikka
- Hiljainen yöllä
- Vessat olivat siistit
- Tiivis yhteisö

Negatiiviset:
- Kaukana kaikesta

I attempted to book a powered site for one night during school holidays. I could clearly see online that a one-night stay was available, however I was having trouble with the payment and called the park to book instead.

The woman I spoke to was extremely rude, abrupt and completely unwilling to help. She immediately told me I could not book for one night, despite it being available online. When I explained that I was only calling because the online system wasn’t working for me and I didn’t want to pay extra for flexible cancellation, she snapped back, “I’d rather you just book online then!”

I explained again that I was trying to do exactly that, but was having trouble. She then spoke to me in a very harsh and dismissive tone and flatly refused to book a one-night stay at all.

As a result of her attitude and refusal to help, they lost my business. I called another caravan park just down the road who were friendly, accommodating and happy to book us in for one night.

Customer service like this is unacceptable. I won’t be staying here and would not recommend this park based on the way I was spoken to
A great place for the kids, you have everything here just put your swag up and enjoy.

Very relaxing & mellow place!
Even got to watch UFC on the tv! And internet is best out of any holiday park we’ve been to and all staff were great from house keeping to room service to reception. Only thing missing is spa pool and maybe sauna but that’s me being picky :)

We have loved our stay at Rivershore.
The staff are so lovely and very helpful. The facilities are awesome, very clean and well kept.  We have stayed in the safari tents and they are amazing. The tents have everything you need comfy bed, aircon, a tv, kitchenette, bathroom (with a shower and bath) and a Webber out on your balcony. This is a yearly visit for us.

Special thanks to the amazing team at Rivershore! Front desk you are just beautiful people; always helpful and polite!
Thank you for helping us when we needed to extend our stay!
Jean you are a treasure to the group they are lucky to have you as their manager!
Craig your empathy towards the visitors and animals alike is truly amazing!
Miss you guys!
By far the Best caravan park resort along the Sunshine Coast. The team are so friendly and helpful. Grounds are spectacular and well manicured. Craig at the restaurant is the best. Thanks team.

Beautiful spot. Camped in camper trailer right on the river. BYO power and water on these sites. Easy access boat ramp. Nice pool with slids. Heaps of room. Paddle boarding the creek was easy. Will definitely return.

We give our stay a 4.8.
We loved our staycation and definitely will be back soon. As a kayaker, being right on the river is magical. Staying in a Safari tent is our kind of camping!  Great facilities, and the staff were all exceptional. We were granted a late check out as well, which was much appreciated.
It would normally be a 5 star rating. The only tiny complaint was that, although booking Driftwood Restaurant early, for 6.30pm, it closed unexpectantly early. We had friends visiting for my birthday dinner, so that was a little disappointing. Otherwise, all was brilliant. Thank you to all!
Warmest regards
Maike & Paul
Yandina

I have stayed here previously and the staff were very friendly. This stay was good except for the lady at reception did not ask how my stay was just abused me for driving over the concrete slab when I was just trying to my car and caravan off road. I would not return to park if this is who I had to deal with. Kind regards Andrew
Love this place but the menu in driftwood is a let down. I recommend the park but eat across the road at the pub.

I have just celebrated my 40th birthday at Ingenia Rivershore and the staff were absolutely amazing in making sure the whole process and event ran very smoothly. The staff went above and beyond for all my guests and myself and we couldn’t be happier. Thanks again team Rivershore. See you again soon 💕

We had a wonderful time at Rivershore Camping Site. The location is secure and conveniently situated, making it easy to explore and enjoy the beautiful surroundings. The staff were friendly and helpful, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere throughout our stay.

The water park was a fantastic highlight — fun for both kids and adults, and the café served delicious food that we thoroughly enjoyed. We also spent time fishing by the lake and hired bikes to explore the area.

The shared cooking facilities were well-equipped, and the toilets and showers were always clean and well-maintained.

Overall, Rivershore Camping Site offers the perfect combination of comfort, convenience, and great hospitality. It’s a wonderful place to relax, have fun, and enjoy nature. Highly recommended! We'll be back.
Absolutely loved my stay here. A big shout out to Jett for his outstanding service for us.  He deserves to be recognised for a job well done and appreciated by us all.

Fabulous large unpowered sites along the river. Site W15 has the best views. However, I heard that the unpowered riverfront sites will soon be turned into glamping & cabin sites once Council has approved it (possibly Jan 2026)

My first time with the kids, my partner had come before with our daughters and her friends. We had our youngest, who had been counting down the sleeps until the slide park, to be awfully treated. We waited for entry, my partner going in to secure a spot. When I got to the service lady, she so rudely told me they were booked out and didn't I see the sign! No i didn't see a sign and I lined up with everyone else. I politely explained my partner had secured a spot and she more aggressively told me again that the sign says we are booked out, then looked at my 11 year old and 5 year old and said" you can't come in!" "Someone is monitering wristbands so im sure he will be kicked out soon". My partner then asked the other lady on duty if there was any room and she tried and was very empathic when the other lady returned and said "I already told them no" The nice lady then booked us in for tomorrow and said come early as i feel it was compensation for the other womens rude service. My kids call her the really rude lady. Extremely disappointing and so unnecessary, she could have it explained it to me nicely, something you expect from customer service. I would definitely have a chat to that staff member, remembering we are paying locals with young kids that love your venue.

Everyone has been so accommodating to us in our extra large bendy bus. The bar staff and reception staff are very helpful and kind. There isn't really any need to leave the camp grounds with fishing, swimming, bouncing castle and go karts to keep everyone happy!
We absolutely love it. The bed was comfortable, space is great. Staff were amazing and food was exceptional. Will definitely be back.
This place is the best! Staff amazing, sites large, amenities clean and modern.

We are local and visit this beautiful place frequently. The amenities and activities are great and the management staff are incredibly friendly and generous and always make our time and experience there a great one.

Absolutely love this place. Got married here and always love coming up from the Gold Coast to stay here. Great location, huge sites, great amenities and the staff are always friendly and helpful. Resort style pool that the kids spend all day having fun.

Our family holiday at Rivershore Ingenia was an absolute dream come true!

From the moment we arrived, the staff were amazing — so friendly, welcoming, and always happy to help. The location is perfect, surrounded by nature and ideal for families.

There’s so much to do — from relaxing by the pool, playing mini golf, fishing, hair braiding, and hours of fun on the bouncing pillow. The kids never stopped smiling, and neither did we!
Everything was clean, well-organised, and designed to make family holidays effortless and fun. We honestly didn’t want to leave. Highly recommend Rivershore Ingenia — the perfect spot for unforgettable family memories!

Such a beautiful camping spot with everything you need, but what really makes it stand out is the staff. They are so welcoming, friendly, and go out of their way to make you feel at home. It’s rare to find a place where the people make such a difference to your stay. Can’t wait to come back.

Fantastic place. Great amenities, kids playground,mini golf and giant jumping pillow. The swimming pool and slide were a favourite for the kids and the private cabanas were a nice touch.
The food at the restaurant was lovely and not to mention the great cocktails at happy hour.
Nice open spaces along the river for larger RV set-ups.

Great Caravan Park
Dog Friendly
Cafe, Bar ,Happy Hour
Very relaxing

We absolutely loved this park. Warm water pool with a lap swimming lane in the deep end. Grass on the caravan site slabs. Clean, modern amenities (the shower heads were great). The roads were very well maintained, as were the vast lawns. The large sites, even for our 30ft caravan made for an easy fit. The park isn't too big and never felt crowded. The staff were lovely too. You'll see us again.
Great amenities, staff were Awesome, well worth the high price!

I celebrated my big birthday here and the staff were absolutely wonderful. Managed to group 9 large campsites together and we had the most fabulous time. Jean on front counter was.exceedingly accommodating and made our stay just brilliant. We stayed 5 nights and hardly left the camp ground. Lovely facilities, heated pool, happy hour and meal specials..the kids fished off the pontoon for hours. Even the teenagers didn't want to leave camp. I cannot wait to go back!

From the moment we checked in the service was amazing,  warming and ever so welcoming. The staff are extremely helpful and friendly and the grounds are immaculate. Couldn't have asked for anything more than what was provided. Thankyou for making our holiday memorable 💖...
Love from the chubby women from Melbourne that loves to swear ✨️😎
Stayed in our own camper. Beautiful big sites. Lots of amenities buildings. Great pool area and had Dinner twice with great meal and service at on-site restaurant. Thankyou

Great and roomy caravan park. Facilities and ammenities are very modern and clean. Great glamping tents. Restaurant, bar and pool areas are comfortable and attractive surrounds. Food great. Service friendly and prompt. Lots happening and I love the frequent text invitations to what’s on. Thanks staff. Lovely place.
Great caravan park close to all major attractions and shops,one of the best we have stayed in. I
Our group went to the restaurant for a meal.
Cool place to chill out with dinner and a Margarita

Great park. Both powered and unpowered sites are great.
Staff went out of their way to help us when it rained non stop, drove us to bus stop and no hesitation in moving us to drier site.
Amenities clean, showered had great water pressure.
Definitely recommend.

We stayed in the family safari tent in August. What a great set up! Keeping the heat pump on kept us warm all night. Loved the location, the staff were amazing and the rooms were excellent. Hands down the most comfy beds I've slept in. I loved the claw foot bath tub too.
The kids loved the pool and slides. The pedal carts were hit too. I loved the bird life and waking to the bird song every morning.

Only complaint was that the beds had flat sheets, not fitted and the sheets kept coming away and tangling up.
We'd be happy to come back and stay again

Fantastic place.
Staff were excellent and go out of there way to help you.
Will definitely be back.

Not a bad park pretty price, some over keen management has spread gravel all over the place which has ruined the grass on the powered sites. Also the mens showers near the pool have the water running out the cubicles making the floor slippery and dangerous. A lovely lady in the office relocated away from the pool pump shed on request.
Very surprised. Really nice

We have just spent 9 nights at Rivershore and it would be one of the best caravan parks we have ever stayed in.  My husband took ill on Sunday and was taken to hospital.  The care and concern that was shown to me by Jean and Aleshia was beyond any expectation I had.  Will certainly recommend Rivershore as the caravan park to stay when in Maroochydore.
A hidden gem.  One of the best camp sites I have ever been to.  If you have kids it is a must with so much to do.

Beware not all Deluxe sites are equal, 40 and 51 are directly opposite the children’s playground and where the food trucks park, loud music from the pool area all day.  If that’s what you want book these if you want something quieter book alongside the field, we did but were advised we hadn’t requested them. Not sure we’ll pay that much again to stay. Shame we’ve previously had a nice time here!

Nice tents and caravan park. With lots of facilities like pool, laundry, tea/coffee maker, kitchen and kitchenette. River side view, friendly staff and good restaurant. Kids can spend whole day without boring, having movie night for kids , kids disco, kids pool, camp fire. common laundry room and kitchen with refrigerator for camping people. BBQ facility
One of the best holidays ever great place ,great people. Highly recommended.
Good location but not really a standout for Ingenia
Great location, clean, neat and tidy. Good restaurant on-site.
Awesome park with friendly staff and great amenities for adults and kids.
Every time we visit the Sunny Coast we receive the very service and I want to give a shout out to lovely lady on the front counter today and Libby behind bar who makes spectacular cocktails

Unreal spot! We just finished up a 3 night stay here. Great big spacious powered sites along the pool side. Park and jumping pillow for the kids as well as a shallow kiddie pool/splash park. Plenty of fun for the big kids with a big heated pool and water slides.Pool side drink service was a big plus. Sites were well maintained. Staff were super friendly and helpful in helping us stay an extra night when we didn't want to leave so soon.

The riverside non powered sites looked amazing also!

Definitely stay here again was the most fantastic family holiday park we have ever stayed at friendly staff the grounds are well kept pool and slides are awesome the amenities such as laundry are clean and easy to use , we stayed in the safari tent its the best thing I’ve ever seen and stayed in such a cool experience furniture is top notch everything clean so much room and had everything you could possibly need also backs onto river easy access for fishing
Great central location. Awesome selection of tasty food and reasonably priced. Look out for the weekly specials!!!! Great bar and selection of beers etc.
Call in for coffee and lunch what great staff great coffee and great food

To the girl behind the cafe counter this morning around 9am, you are an exceptional asset and thank you for trying to keep the customer line moving forward in order. She obviously has great customer service skills. Thanks again

We recently stayed in one of the glamping tents at this holiday resort and came away with mixed feelings. Having stayed here before and thoroughly enjoyed it, we were looking forward to another relaxing experience—but unfortunately, this visit didn’t quite live up to expectations.||The positives are still there: the tent was absolutely beautiful—well-designed, spotless, and very comfortable. The surrounding grounds remain as lovely as ever, offering a peaceful natural setting and thoughtful touches that make the resort visually appealing.||However, the tranquility we had hoped for was disrupted by a couple of key issues. Noise from the nearby main road was quite noticeable, especially during the night. In addition, some of the guests staying nearby played loud music, which really impacted the relaxing atmosphere and made it hard to unwind.||This resort has so much potential, and we know from past experience that it can be a truly peaceful getaway. With better noise control and clearer expectations for guest behaviour, it could easily return to being the restful escape it once was.

Amazing camping venue by the creek. Although we stayed in our swags it had a resort feel. The showers and all facilities were first class.

The boat ramp was very handy also. We will be back on day.
Brilliant service, bar staff couldn’t do more for you

Stayed the weekend at this CP and had a great stay.  Went to Happy Hour both days and we were very impressed with Craig the manager of food and beverage. Very hands on and excellent service from the staff
Thanks Craig for the personalised service. You made us feel special and at home. Coming from Perth WA you made us feel like we were the only people in the restaurant. Highly recommend this place.

Enjoyed our stay on a powered site at times the amenities were a little untidy as I only seen them cleaning them once a day during the morning , unfortunately the pool was closed for maintenance throughout our stay however there was plenty of other things to do. The restaurant onsite makes delicious food and beverages.

We highly recommend this caravan park! The grounds are beautifully maintained, the location is stunning, and the staff are incredibly friendly and accommodating.
Everything was perfect  we couldn’t fault a single thing. We’ll definitely be spreading the word and recommending it to everyone we know.
Thank you so much for making our long weekend such an enjoyable and memorable stay!

My husband and I stayed in a safari tent right in front of the river. It was peaceful with a beautiful view and fishing spot. The room was tidy and absolutely perfect for winter—even though the nights were seriously cold. I'm 19 weeks pregnant, so I was a bit worried about the facilities, but now I'm actually looking forward to coming back with our newborn baby.
Thank you to the team for helping us make such wonderful memories.
Great park

Unser Lieblings Campingplatz an der Sunshine Coast!
Es ist alles tip top, sehr sauber und alles sehr modern. Es gibt einen großen Pool und ein Restaurant.
Am Wochenende leider recht teuer, aber da fahren wir immer nach Noosa.
Ist ne 10/10!
Great park awesome staff sites are big every thing is well maintained and an awesome pool
Fantastics facilities topped with a restaurant & Cafe &  Bar while watching kids in pool

The customer service line is unanswered after 7 calls.  Emails are not returned.
Socially media continually joins you for bookings and payment.

Cannot cancel.
VERY POOR CUSTOMER SERVICE.

We cannot wait to go back. The park and amenities were immaculate and the pool, bar and restaurant are amazing. The sites are a good size, we stayed on a powered site and had plenty of room. Also, the staff are very friendly and helpful.
Good facilities, great location but amazing staff. Been here so many times and always left with a smile.

Can't comment in rooms as we have our own van, but what an amazing place. Currently staying here and can't wait to come back. Lovely and quiet, great for fishing and kayaking. Pool with a bar what more could you want. Oh and if you have kids, heaps for them to be involved in.

We are local and have been here a few times and despite the lovely and accommodating new managers the standards and attention to detail have really lapsed. The stairs on the slide could be gurneyed, as could the pool slide rules, cobwebs on back of toilet doors, weeds near cabanas and blood on female toilet doors have been there for days. I recommend regular cleaning and grounds inspections as it isn’t maintained as well as it used to be. However I would like to say a big thankyou to Alicia who ensured we extended our stay and didn’t have to move sites. She is lovely and you can’t tell she really enjoys her job!

The best swimming - playground - bar layout we’ve seen in a caravan park. Perfect for families with kids. Dog friendly. Very clean and modern facilities. We stayed in the basic powered site which did the job, but would consider the unpowered riverside sites next time.
Good facilities, right on the river.

This is a very lovely place to stay, clean, and friendly staff, that look after you,  the grounds are well kept.Toilets kept clean. The pool area gives a very resort style feeling.
We really enjoyed our stay and wanted to stay longer honestly one of the best parks we’ve been to .

I organized a surprise week at Rivershore for my parents 50th wedding anniversary and their 70th birthdays. Family and friends traveled from Victoria and other parts of qld to stay and celebrate. Jean and her staff went above and beyond to keep this surprise from my parents, who kept ringing trying to check in early and ruin the surprise! Jean was in constant contact when guests arrived to ensure the staff were not giving the surprise away and to make sure it all went off without a hitch. It did! ||There were 21 of us in various accommodation types and nothing was too much for the staff to accommodate us. From delivering groceries to the glamping tents so my cousin and kids were in place for the big surprise, to providing extra beds when our tent got flooded! ||On check in I was gifted pedal cart vouchers for the kids and a cocktail voucher for me! On check out my parents were personally gifted wine, chocolates and a Rivershore hat from Jean to congratulate them on their milestones and thank them for staying at Rivershore. ||It was torrential rain and wind all week yet we still swam, played mini golf, cricket, board games, used the water slides, did water aerobics, roasted marshmallows and made family memories we won't forget. Especially my Mum and Dad's reaction to that surprise! Thank you so much Jean and staff, it means more than I can say ||I highly recommend Rivershore, all accommodation options are amazing with something to suit everyone. The staff are happy and treat each other and guests like family. The facilities and location are perfect for all ages and it is a wonderful holiday in any weather.

I organized a surprise week at Rivershore for my parents 50th wedding anniversary and their 70th birthdays. Family and friends traveled from Victoria and other parts of qld to stay and celebrate. Jean and her staff went above and beyond to keep this surprise from my parents, who kept ringing trying to check in early and ruin the surprise! Jean was in constant contact when guests arrived to ensure the staff were not giving the surprise away and to make sure it all went off without a hitch. It did!

There were 21 of us in various accommodation types and nothing was too much for the staff to accommodate us. From delivering groceries to the glamping tents so my cousin and kids were in place for the big surprise, to providing extra beds when our tent got flooded!

On check in I was gifted pedal cart vouchers for the kids and a cocktail voucher for me! On check out my parents were personally gifted wine, chocolates and a Rivershore hat from Jean to congratulate them on their milestones and thank them for staying at Rivershore.

It was torrential rain and wind all week yet we still swam, played mini golf, cricket, board games, used the water slides, did water aerobics, roasted marshmallows and made family memories we won't forget. Especially my Mum and Dad's reaction to that surprise! Thank you so much Jean and staff, it means more than I can say

I highly recommend Rivershore, all accommodation options are amazing with something to suit everyone. The staff are happy and treat each other and guests like family. The facilities and location are perfect for all ages and it is a wonderful holiday in any weather.

Enjoyed staying four nights in a motorhome. The weather was not perfect but we  managed two days cycling . Two days walking and catching the bus. Rivershore to Noosa for lunch 50cents bus trip with no parking problems !
The facilities are really good pool was great . I appreciated the time the staff take to keep the verandah area dry during the rain . Coffee and cake / cakes not to be missed . Bar and dining service great . Staff are friendly and helpful. Amazing cleaners who kept the bathrooms dry and clean . No puddles under the awning the.  Artificial grass pads are great . Well done team

What a fantastic resort!!! Honestly, this is one of the best parks we have stayed at. We were supposed to go elsewhere for 2 nights but due to the intense rain, we changed our trip and ended up here. I can honestly say we were very happy everything changed.||We spent 2 nights in a King Safari Tent, special mid week rate. Cot and high chair were setup by the time we arrived. Talk about glamping, this was a beautiful setup. Air con, full bathroom with free standing bath, shower, toilet all separate to bedroom. Tv, coffee & tea making, BBQ on the deck overlooking the river.||Whilst we didn’t use the laundry facilities scattered around the park we had a quick browse and noticed there were quite a few, plenty of machines available, laundry powder, games machines etc. The pools were also excellent, our 11 month old loved the child’s pool and even though I’m a little old for the slides, you could clearly see the older kids loving them!||We ate pretty much every meal at the restaurant/bar. Every time the food was great! Well priced, fresh, tasty and pretty fast. The real shining light to this place though was the staff. Every single person we met was extremely friendly and just happy to help in any way possible. A real credit to the business, well done everyone!

We have only just arrived a few hours ago and are super impressed, a group booking for a 50th surprise wedding anniversary. The team here have gone all out to ensure it went smoothly, even upgrading our booking as we had booked a room on the other side of the park away from the main group oops!! We are suitably impressed with the glamping tent!! It has a claw foot bath and a massive and very comfortable bed!!
Lunch was delicious, I can’t wait to see what the next few days bring!!

Perfect location in the middle of theme Sunshine Coast with easy access to the highway to get around. We used this spot as base camp for a weekend of kids sports. Very glad we did. Pool and restaurant are constantly packed though, and they allow outside visitors to pay to use the facilities. At $250+ for a caravan site the weekend and then not really behind able to get a seat at the restaurant or a spot / chair by the pool it felt a little disappointing. The park was full this weekend + another 20-30 car of visitors it’s over capacity for enjoyable use of facilities. The sites are big, but the roads are tight to maneuver through as they have wooden posts to save the grass, make the corners wider could prevent the grass from being run over. It’s a hell of a lot of space that  as been a little Jammed in.

Overall, it’s a really nice place, and clearly just a super busy weekend here. We will absolutely come back and book a waterfront site again.

We recently had the most magical experience at Ingenia Rivershore for our wedding, and it truly exceeded all our expectations. From the moment we arrived, we were blown away by the exceptional service that made our stay unforgettable. We spent the morning getting ready in the beautiful glamping tents, which were nothing short of stunning—comfortable, elegant, and a perfect setting to start our special day.

A huge shoutout to Laetitia, who went above and beyond to ensure our experience was seamless and memorable. Upon check-in, I was greeted with such a thoughtful gesture—chocolates, wine, and roses in our tent. It brought tears to my eyes and reminded me of how rare and meaningful it is to experience such personalized, old-school service in today's world.

It’s also so clear that the staff at Ingenia Rivershore genuinely enjoy working together. The way everyone interacts with one another shows a true sense of team spirit and unity. It truly feels like one big family, which makes the entire experience even more special. Every member of the team, from reception to the restaurant, housekeeping, and grounds crew, went out of their way to make our stay perfect.

Our wedding reception at the Driftwood Restaurant was a dream come true; the atmosphere was intimate, beautiful, and complemented by the impeccable service. We honestly felt like family throughout our stay, and we can't wait to share this experience with everyone we know. A massive thank you to everyone who made our wedding day so special. We’ll definitely be back!

Loved our stay .
Large van sites and a great pool .

What a fabulous place for families! We had about 14 people - various ages from 3 - 69 years stay for a 3-night stay. Caravaning, glamp tenting etc. It was a really wonderful and affordable holiday. The cost of drinks, food, ice blocks etc - was so reasonable. One night we went to the Waterfront Hotel which was a 7-minute walk, and the food was great. Some of the gardens and fixtures around the place require some maintenance before it gets a bit too much further. All the staff were incredible, except for one lady who became irritated with me when I complained about a dog locked inside a van and it hadn't stopped barking. Very likely that we will stay again.

Rivershore was an awesome place to stay, staff were very friendly and extra helpful 😀.
The manager was just as lovely!
Kids enjoyed the waterside in the pool and caught some fish in the river.
We will definitely be back ⛰️

What a great spot! The distance to town is roughly 5-10 mins drive but the location of being out of town is blissful and makes it worth it. Pool side, deluxe site in a van: perfection. ||Positives: Good staff; in particular Alisha! She was the best! She went over and above for our family. Other positives included good facilities, great pool area, good for kids of all ages, so including (go karts, mini putt putt, bounce pillow, soccer, water park, pool, slides, playground and best of all open grass!). Another positive, the parent rooms are such a great idea! We had 3 to pick from, which were also unisex / disabled toilets and this was great. We used these every day! ||Negative: The facilities via the pool are not well kept, as they could be. We were made aware on arrival that this is the bathrooms day visitors so obviously they get used a lot, so it makes sense.

Ok not cheap (we were on a powered site)..  but you do get good, helpful staff, great location, well maintained grounds and amenities. The drinks are reasonably priced and there's happy hour. There is a restaurant and it's reasonably priced.

We have been here for a week now between the off grid camping and now in one of the King safari tents. As a young family I cannot rate this place better. Between the pool and water slides, dining and bistro and the truly incredible staff here. I don’t think you will find a better stay in the Sunshine Coast as an all included stay.

Staff are wonderful, friendly and very helpful. We stayed on the river and were lucky enough to have the place to ourselves - most of the time ;)
Mozzies are horrible but with plenty of bug spray, coils and long clothing, it’s ok. (Not ingenia’s fault though.
Kids loved the pool and the slides! And the pool side dinner made it great for parents to supervise and relax!
With great food options and awesome happy hour, even better when it’s extended!

Wir waren hier mit einem Campervan und es hat uns sehr gut gefallen. Es ist alles sauber. Es gibt Duschen mit Fön und ein tolles Café. Die Mitarbeiter sind sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Für Kinder wird auch einiges geboten und man kann jede Menge Spaß dort haben. Der Kleinkinder Pool ist jedoch etwas tief für die ganz Kleinen (50cm).

Great park to stay at, I stayed here with my young family of 5.
The weather was not ideal, there were plenty of activities when the rain went away.

We had a powered van site, the facilities are clean, new and the pool and slides are fantastic. All the staff are wonderful and they really do care for the kids having a good time, not just running kids activities, genuinely wanting all to have a great stay. Highly recommended. List of activities in the school holidays. We will be back.
Only gripe in the food at the restaurant isn't that great but overall the park experience is great! Great services and great staff. Just need to ban the kids on electric scooters.

Spent a week with family split over 4 premium powered sites with kids from 16 months to 6yrs old during the peak Christmas period. Everyone had different style setups/ vans but each site was extremely spacious (huge to be honest).  We were super lucky to score 4 sites together to enjoy our Family vacay.

Facilities were thoroughly cleaned and maintained daily including lawn care, fully equipped camp kitchen, coin/ tap & pay laundry blocks, dump point, numerous amenties blocks and a sensational pool area.  Plenty of entertainment options for kids with carts, putt putt, jumping castles etc.

The bar/bistro has a great menu variety, reasonably priced plus daily food vans visit to mix up options for guests. QR codes on your site and throughout the pool and bistro means drinks and food is quickly and easily delivered to you.  Pool was cleaned daily and both adults and kids enjoyed the slides.    Fishing from the river/ jetty enjoyed by all.

Dogs are permitted on ground floor of bar/ bistro area and all owners adhered to rules to keep dogs on leash and under control during our stay.

Location is close to local beaches, caltex, IGA, bottle shop, and not far from main town, shopping centre and water sports.

Daily updates texted to guests each day on specials or information.   Numerous thefts occurred during our stay which staff kept guests informed and on alert so do ensure you lock items of value away at night or when unattended.  Not parks fault just optimistic thieves ruining peoples holidays unfortunately.

Would stay again.
Toilets blocked bit of wasteland beside river not suitable for swimming has bull sharks in the river 100 perc better if u can get into cotton tree  PinCushion camp on sea and  mouth of  river
In the middle of paradise, but photos don’t seem like the real thing

Hello ,can not fault the service .you guys went out of your way for us . One think i would like to point out though is the magpie problem . I realize it is out of your hands however we could not eat outside the airstream caravan as ther was bird poo literally everywhere , i would recommend a daily clean on the mat and the table and chairs . Then we can clean whatever happens during the day . It definetly built up over the week we stayed and looked disgusting and we could not eat outside … thanks again .

Went here for Christmas with family, staff that were on were on were really helpful nothing was too much trouble and overall it was a very relaxing getaway. My niece even had a little injury in the park and the on site manager was there to help every step of the way.

Girls weekend away and couldn’t have asked for a better place to stay in our van. Large sites, food was awesome, loved the happy hour and cocktail selection. Lots for little and big kids. Definitely a gem of a place! Will be back with the family for sure
Good people ' Great service.👍

We loved it so much here we decided to stay longer!! Staff and facilities were fantastic, lawn sites are level and so lovely to park on. Super busy on weekends with locals using the restaurant/pool but mid week was a delight

This was our first stop on our northbound road trip. The kids had a great time here. We stayed in a family tent, which was the perfect size. The BBQ facilities were brand new, and the pool was the kids’ favourite!

Riverside is the gem I didn't know we were looking for. The caravan sites are very generous, the amenities are new, tidy, well done, and plentiful around the park. The pool is a great size for lots of people, and the slides are a winner for kids big and small. The on-site restaurant and bar are also awesome, with good portion sizes and reasonable prices. The only downside is that you can't bring your own drinks or food into the pool area. Otherwise, it's a pretty perfect spot.
Being next to the creek, mosquitoes are a thing to manage.

We stayed on a deluxe powered right across from the pool. Our site was perfect.
Pool was lovely, food, cocktails, and service was great. Our kids had a ball.
Stopped in for 1 night on my travels. Ran into owner at the bar/restaurant. Had a few beers and a steak. Had a fantastic stay and can't wait to bring the family back sometime
Staff are so nice, welcoming and made sure we are well looked after!
One of the best places I been with my family

We are usually very much resort people and so booked this glamping tent not really knowing what to expect and we were very impressed! |The tent was clean and spacious, the towels and linen were hotel quality and the bed was super comfortable. |The park facilities were outstanding, a great pool and bar area and the grounds are beautifully maintained.|The tent felt very private and had a lovely lawn area and view of the river.|The staff were very welcoming and friendly, from check in to check out.|Highly recommend this spot and we will be back again next time we visit the Sunshine Coast.

We absolutely loved our stay at ingenia holidays at rivershore! We stayed in our caravan so can’t comment on rooms, but there are heaps of kid friendly activities including a wonderful pool with awesome slides, a park, go-karts, putt putt golf and due to it being Halloween when we stayed they had trick or treating, a scavenger hunt, discos and movie nights (even though it wasn’t in school holidays)!

The staff are incredibly friendly and willing to help at all points of your stay and the amenities are clean and up to date. When we shifted things around for our stay the staff were super willing to help. The park is very safe and secure as well - we went to K’gari for a week and came back to our caravan safe and sound 👌

The restaurant is excellent and staff were super accomodating of me being gluten intolerant, and there were already lots of gluten free options too. The caravan park is also only 15 mins from a few plaza with heaps of stores, so easily accessible for that, and lots of disability friendly ramps and spaces too.

We will absolutely be back! Thanks Ingenia Holidays!

I like t there the food and the slide was fun it was fun maybe I I should come back again next week it was fun I like it there it was fun me and Owen are where on the water slides it was fun maybe I should come. Back again it was fun I like like it it was fun it was fun

Newly renovated bathrooms were in disrepair and un functional. There was no hot water on 3/5 showers.
The main road is very noisy, there should not be campsites valued at over $100 per night positioned against it facing dumpsters and the dump point.
Most of the staff were very friendly except for one woman who was very put out when asked about peddle cart hire.
Would never stay here again and wouldn’t recommend
We had an enjoyable stay at Rivershore we would love to stay again
This is a must do the glamping Safari tents were amazing! So much to do!  the pool is fabulous

Amazing holiday park!
So much to do with the kids.
The heated  pool is awesome!

We stayed for 2 nights at the King Safari tent as a family of 4, and we were really happy with how clean, cozy, and beautiful it was. The facilities are excellent, and the general bathrooms are always kept clean. A staff member at the pool kept an eye on the children so they wouldn't run and be prone to accidents. The restaurant's food is outstanding, and there's something new every day. The restaurant staff are friendly and kind. The receptionists are super friendly and helpful. They had many extra activities for the children every day. They have an SMS system that keeps us informed about what is happening throughout the day, including activities, food specials, live music, weather, etc. My kids enjoyed it so much. We wish we had done more, as they have so many more things to do, like fishing and going to a night fire pit, but we needed more time. We had just stayed six nights in a villa at Oaks Resort in Caloundra before staying at Ingenia Rivershore, and the Ingenia Rivershore was ten times better. We wish we had stayed more days at Rivershore. We will come back.

Me and my family had a pleasant stay at one of the king safari tents recently for a few nights, for the first time.

As well as our tent, the common areas were well-maintained and provided a comfortable environment for guests to relax. The surrounding landscape was beautiful, the kids activities and the pool kept the kids well entertained during our stay.

But unfortunately, the restaurant at the caravan park served horrible food. We’ve tried a few different dishes and the quality was beyond poor. However, the biggest disappointment wasn’t the food itself, but the staff lack of courtesy regarding this matter. Undoubtedly an issue to be addressed.

We camped at a non-powered site by the river, which was flat, green and near perfect. Combined with a great pool for the kids and cabana service for drinks, it was an excellent combination of camping and resort feel.
Road noise was unexpectedly high at night time
good fishing!
Will definitely be making this our top pick for family vaca! Was amazing, bathrooms were clean and staff were super friendly!

The friendliest, happiest staff ever!
Our glamping tent is glorious! On the deck, overlooking the river. The beautiful breeze coming in. Fantastic pool! The waterslides are great for kids and adults. Pedal carts and mini golf help keep everyone entertained! Honestly best park I have stayed in and I’ve stayed in lots all over the country! Super convenient to amenities including boat hire. Great boat ramp here and jetty and fish cleaning station.

We stayed here for 12 nights whilst we were getting married on the sunshine coast. It was lovely, sites are large and staff are so accommodating. The best park we've ever stayed at. We will definitely be back when visiting the sunshine coast next 😀
Love the holiday park and staff. Will come back again

I had a one night stay while my children were at camp. The whole experience was of the absolute highest standard and a real luxury for a widowed parent of high needs young people. The site was beautiful and the safari tent was pure luxury. I will be saving up to return!
A regular visit for us when at the Sunshine Coast, to have a family meal at Driftwood at Rivershore. Fabulously friendly staff, great food and atmosphere is relaxing.

At $109 a night less my Big4 membership discount for a Deluxe Power site is very expensive especially when I bought my own bed. I was told it is a resort, but to us, it was somewhere to park the caravan. I asked the man next door how much he paid, and was advised $87 a night, so I queried it at the office without a satisfactory explanation. I did not use the pool, or the restaurant or bar, although they did look good. I would not like to be there when it is wet, as very flat or in school holidays, as it could be very noisy. The park is about 7km from Maroochydore with a good bike path to get to from the park and it is close to the Waterfront hotel.

We stayed in a King Safari tent.|The campground is amazing, clean and spacious it has amazing facilities for all the family. Large green spaces, dog friendly, fabulous pool.|As for the tent, WOW, everything down to the smallest details are wonderful. The bath is luxurious. Heaps of space, very private with gardens/trees in between each tent. |The king size bed it to die for. Extremely comfortable. |Lots of extra touches, throw rugs, beach towels for the pool, seating and loungers on the deck.|Much nicer than most holel rooms.|Perfectly priced
Neat and tidy, friendly staff.

Ein mega schöner, moderner und super gepflegter Campingplatz. Der sehr schön gestaltete Poolbereich lud sehr ein für schwimmen, relaxen und Sonnenbaden. Sehr feine Drinks an der Bar. Tolle Rutschen für Kinder! Es hat auch eine kleinere Minigolf-Anlage. Wären gerne noch länger geblieben.

What a fantastic park , ingenia parks are very good and most are pet friendly , this one is only 3 stars no idea why should be 5 stars , has everything and the sites are very big .|,Bli Bli is 4 Klm away for your shopping , IGA etc |and close to Maroochydore .

We’ve traveled Australia in our caravan and this would have to be one of the best parks we’ve stayed at. Grassy sites, clean facilities. Plenty of activities for the kids, the pool is heated and two fun slides,  good temp for the kids even in winter. But the most important bit is the friendliness of the staff we are having car issues and unsure on length of stay but were able to book in for 2 but only pay for the one if that’s all we need. You don’t get this service anymore it’s much appreciated. We will be back and you should visit too. Also must add fantastic pool side restaurant and the restaurant delivers food to sites!!!!

We have come here 3 times now and it’s absolute heaven on earth for the whole family! So kid and dog friendly :) great cafe and restaurant all day :) movie nights for kids. Playground next to restaurant and overlooking the pool with 2 water slides :) amenities are always clean and well maintained! Favourite park in AUS. This place is so great the locals pay for day passes to hang out with their kids on weekends!

Great spot. Amenities were clean and fairly new. Awesome pool with slides,
Kiddies pool, ping pong table, playground, putt putt, hire pedal carts and jumping pillow. Considering it is next to a main road, it was pretty quiet. Highly recommend.

Love this park. We've stayed in the glamping tents which were 1st class & we've had our van on site. Everything is spotless & new. The staff are all extremely friendly & the bonus of a licenced bar/restaurant just tops it off. We'll definitely be back!

We stayed in a glamorous safari tent, and it was fabulous!!  Looking out to the river, beautifully fitted out, it had everything we needed, including room service! The staff were wonderful, and the whole experience was top notch!! Thank you 🥰
Stayed a couple of nights while heading north. Great facilities and location.
Amazing weekend away for my son's birthday. The staff were fantastic and very accommodating. Beautiful location and tons of activities for the kids! Can't wait to come back next year
The campsite was a delightful location that catered to all of our needs. We have already made plans to return in the near future.

Great place for the family,staff are friendly pool and bar amazing.only downside is parking, due to work commitments my wife turned up and left at different times so had to bring 2 cars,would prefer to be more accommodating for a 2nd car considering there is no option for street parking.

Good spot, we tent camped with firepit at each, plenty of people fishing and the pool and loungers looked great. Food at the restaurant was nice cocktails were average and the toilet showers were modern but needed cleaning regularly not just at the start and end of day i think. Otherwise would go again

Just went for the pool and waterslides.
Highly recommend!
5 stars. What a stunning location, absolute bliss. All staff are greatly welcoming and accommodating. Thank you for a beautiful 3 nights away.

We had a wonderful long weekend stay here with our octogenarian parents and our family of 4. We stayed in a Family Safari Tent and a King Safari Tent side by side. Even though the park was full - we couldn't believe how quiet it was for us facing the green grass and river! It has all of the camping feels but with all of the glamping luxuries - claw foot bath, wonderful shower, kitchenette, webber bbq and reverse cycle aircon!!

We still enjoyed barista made coffees, the restaurant and bar, and the waterslides but then retreated to our decks for breakfasts and even had dinner delivered to us! Fishing off the resort's pontoon and toasting marshmallows under the Milky Way were like cherries on top! Even the rain on one of our days didn't dampen our spirits since we could stay cosy in our glamping tents and watch the weather come and go!

A very kind offer to stay an extra night no charge was such a huge blessing for us after experiencing car trouble coming back from the Buderim Forest Walk that was recommended to us. As a family with a child with special needs we appreciated all of the kindnesses offered to us during our magic stay! We will definitely be back again (this being our third stay) and highly recommend the stay to others!

We have  stayed at Rivershore on numerous occasions. This time we have been camped for 2 weeks. The place is a gem 😃 The restaurant is amazing and has not let us down yet again.
The staff treat us like family and special mention has to be made to Shane , Emi, Jean and James 😃
We will  be back 👍
Beutifull location with amazing staff close by to the river has an amazing pool on site worth a visit

What an absolute gem of a place. Hubby booked this as a surprise, and when he said we were staying at a caravan park I was kinda thinking great this will be fun (not) generally we stay at hotels (I know I sound like a snob but I am not) but how wrong was I. When I saw the safari tents I got excited but when I saw the inside Oh my gosh it was beautiful. This is glamping at its best. Could not fault anything it was beautiful inside all I needed was to see the elephant walk past and it would have felt like maybe being in Africa glamping out on the wide open plains….😂 recommend this place 100% if you are looking to stay somewhere different
Awesome park great pool and bar area kids loved this place just down the road from the Wakepark and across the road from a fresh produce market

Had such a great time. Stayed 4 nights southern end unpowered, 2024 QLD Easter school holidays with 2A 1C (5 years old). Unpowered sites are HUGE and grass beautifully kept. Amenities were very good and cleaned frequently, showers delightfully hot and free. Bins close by to sites and I counted them being emptied at minimum 3 times a day. Restaurant food and drinks slightly on the higher price range but only marginally more than you would pay at any other restaurant, food was really good and absolutely fantastic you can sit and relax while keeping eyes on the kids as you have full view over the pool and playground. Onto the pool and playground, so awesome you can book a cabana (no cost) for two hour periods and order food/drinks via code and delivered directly to the cabana. Spent many hours watching our little guy in the kids pool while we chilled in the cabana. Waterslides were a huge hit with young and young at heart! Indoor playroom could use a bit of a jazz up but not much time was spent in there due to having so many other things to do. Mr 5 was never bored and didn't complain once about having nothing to do. Our ONLY issue is the road noise, it really is pretty bad being on a major road between sunny coast and the freeway, it did wake us up on several occasions due to massive flogs who used the road as their drag strip. We thought a suggestion may be to plant bamboo along the fence line of the property as it is an inexpensive and efficient noise block, would also look pretty cool! Hope to see something like this implemented in the future because we will be back at every chance we get.

Very nice park
Good service

I love going to ingenia river shore. it's an amazing place to either camp or glamp. It has a small water park and putt putt golf on site, which is great for the kids and big kids. The food and drink are always amazing, and I have never had a bad meal there yet.

The only things i can nite pick is when it rains, the lack of drainage on the sites can turn any camping site into a slosh pit that won't dry even if you have 3 days of sun.
The second thing would be that the putt putt golf is very poorly maintained and probably is due for a revamp.
Staff are friendly and accommodative, and the tents were spacious and clean. Our little one loves the slides, pool, and playgrounds.
We had an amazing stay in the family tent. The kids loved the pool area and the staff were very friendly. We wish we could stay longer!

I liked it so much in the middle of the road trip and stayed for 4 nights! All the staff were friendly and went to the restaurant to eat every day.
Children can play happily in the pool, and there is a restaurant where adults can enjoy drinking alcohol next to them. The amenity room is also so beautiful that I can't believe it's a campground! I want to go again!

Great place for all ages, caters for everyone all round & so close to everything else for adventures out. We ended up staying there mostly as has pools, slides, mini golf, boat ramp, fishing, go cart style things, pizza/ rib etc cook truck onsite, restaurant,  bar, you name it.
Great caravan park, excellent ameneties. Fantastic bar and restaurant facilities. Magnificent pool.

Best holiday park. Bar is wonderful. The pool and slides are amazing.
The safari tent was beautiful and comfortable to stay in. Very clean.
Great spot, would be ideal for families!

Awesome place it's gets very busy on the weekends.

Rusty was a star and very helpful
Great spot,  very modern clean and tidy with nice sites and good layout and facilities.
A one night stop over on our way north and we absolutely loved it! 5 star facilities, food & drinks. Lovely level sites. Perfect for a family holiday. We cant wait for our next trip
Absolutely awesome spot to come and stay. We will definitely be coming back here.

What an absolutely amazing stay we have had! Stayed in a king safari tent! Everything has been so well thought out! Didn’t want for anything! Have never been so impressed with every little detail! The pool was fantastic and the activities for the kids were amazing! The restaurant was great! Food so good! Coffee amazing! Cocktails great too! The staff are so friendly and go out of their way to assist! Nothing is too much hassle. If you are lucky enough to meet the owners you will understand why this place is pretty special! Just genuine people inviting others to share in their slice of paradise … We will certainly be back!

Beautiful family holiday experience with superb customer service.

See you again soon ❤️
Great location
I have eaten here the food is amazing.  Professional chefs
What a great place to go with families!! Great staff, fantastic facilities. Even with storms and then extreme heat, the place just worked for us. Air conditioned glamping tents - amazing!

Overall a beautifull park with a great pool. facilities are very clean and amazing. we just had  a few issues with other guests older children bullying our younger children, and a few internet problems. The owners addressed problems straight away, to which i was very thankfull.. the park is very quiet. on the whole it was an enjoyable holiday. I would definitely recommend this park to stay for a holiday.

We have been coming to Rivershore since it opened. This year I found the facilities have become quite run down and dirty looking. This is not due to cleaners but the buildings have not had any work done to them. The price was a little bit to high I feel when you are bringing your own accommodation eg: caravan with toilet and shower etc.

We had a fabulous visit! The staff were so so so friendly and helpful!!! The sarangi tent was lovely with a great porch facing the river. Everything was super comfortable. The pool and the water slides were so much fun, my son loved it! Thank you for a fabulous 2 days!
Nice pool. Nice staff

This was our 2nd trip and we found this one detracted from our previous stay. The quality and range on the menu has dropped and become expensive. Its still ok but not as good as last year. The park itself is good, level sites and spread out well so you aren't on top of each other but it is very expensive. It appears it may be one of the most expensive in Qld from reports of neighbours at the site at nearly $200 for a powered site seems over the top.
Awesome location & facilities.  Team were friendly, helpful, accommodating.  Was a perfect holiday!  We will be back.  So good for young and old kids.   Massive Pool, slides, facilities.
Awesome place to stay with the kids. Pool is amazing and love that you can be served food and drinks to the pool cabanas
Great little stay as was for a 16th birthday and kids loved the pool was a little expensive for camping but overall great place and lovely staff

Daughter and I just camped here for 2 nights and we will be back for sure! Best camp site by far! Very kid friendly and very adult friendly too! Enjoyed a cocktail by the pool while daughter enjoyed the use for the slide for 8 hours straight!
My daughter has not stopped talking about our trip and when we will be back! Grounds tidy, toilet facilities are great and pool/ restaurant the biggest highlight!

Fantastic place for a family holiday. Safari Tent was outstanding. Kids are safely able to ride their scooters around. They had so much fun at the pool and on the water slides. Lost a star for the beds. The single beds were very soft and not the best to sleep on.

Great park, especially for families. Everything is centred around the pool. Every day, they have a specials board. We indulged in "date night" on Wednesday. 2 meals and 2 drinks $55.
Had a great day's golfing near by, at Twin Waters.
We have told lots of people about this fantastic park. Well, worth a visit
Best family holiday. All ages had a great time from our teen to our toddler. Highly recommend, we're already booked for next year!

Probably the best place i have ever stayed, not only did the accomdate for me last minute for 2 whole nights on a friday night at 6pm but they were so kind about it as i was in a situation being stuck with no where to stay after a bad experience with big 4 maroochy they took me in for a great price on a massive site and on top of that the activites are 5 stars the resturant and bar is 5 stars and they knock the competition up the road out of the park i will always go back there when in sunshine coast and excited to be there new years eve and very lucky to get a spot being only 3 weeks away thank you for accomdating for me guys
As a Motel manager i needed some R&R and the park certainly provided that. Customer service was amazing. Text messages sent daily was really good. Will reccommend and will be staying again.

As an Event Organiser it is always important to deliver to my group of guests (Rolling Solo) what I had promised and Ingenia Rivershore Resort most certainly went above and beyond with great service and friendliness and we will most certainly be back again.

Stayed here for the second time this year. Travelling from WA. Our month stay this time was as good as earlier in the year. Can’t fault this place.. Friendly staff, clean facilities, great restaurant. Enjoyed the pool.Great location.
Thank you
We will be back !

Never been glamping before the missus chose it. Big tent with separate bathroom nice place.
Not much to complain about maybe there to close together and you can hear what the neighbours are saying.  Room make up was ok but they don't touch the dishes.
But good all in all
The daily communication regarding upcoming activities and events was amazing. Staff were incredibly friendly and accommodating. Perfect entertainment for the kids!

We stayed for a week in the Glamping Tent Cabins, which were really luxurious.  There was a group of us and we had a private wedding on the grounds in the middle of the week.  We pre-ordered food platters from the Driftwood restaurant that is onsite, which were amazing. The customer service of the staff is definitely 5 star, they are always helpful and seem very happy. If you don't mind a 10pm quiet curfew this is the perfect place to hold a destination wedding.
Thank you Ingenia - we had the perfect week.

I would highly recommend hiring the King Safari tent they are beautiful,calming and relaxing.
Staff very friendly an helpful
Very family friendly will definitely be back
Had a 3-day holiday here. It is a site great for families. My kid loves here. We will definitely come back.

We chose this location due to the fact that we wanted to try the safari tents, glamping.

It has to be one of the most relaxing stays we have had in a long time!

This was a birthday/end of uni combined celebration getaway and we were extremely impressed with the accommodation and staff attentiveness.

We will come a little more prepared next time as the kids activities were some of the best we have seen with the pool being a focal area of the location.
Excellent.

Overall we had a good experince at Ingenia Holidays Rivershore. The location was nice, the facilities were fantastic. The only thing that let the stay down for me was the untidy bathrooms. They were not cleaned one day I was ther and when it was cleaned the showers need a good scrub there was grim still in the showers. Other than this it was a nice stay and I would recommend to family and friends.
A great park. Facilities clean. Friendly staff. The grounds are well maintained. I would definitely recommend.

The staff at the park are unbelievable go above and beyond keep you informed on things happening at the park like happy hour at the bar also the pool is amazing and when we were leaving asked if we could have a late Check out dur to flight being delayed they were happy for us to stay until 12pm. I would recommend to anyone.

We stayed in the Bambi airstream which was super cute. The only downside was the bed was really hard & the blinds were in the way next to the bed, otherwise we loved it. The park had good facilities, great showers in the bathrooms. Park was clean & tidy & the staff were all really friendly & helpful. We will definitely be back.
Good food top SERVICE 10 out of 10 👍👍👍👍👍🍹🥂🍻
Was a beautiful safari tent, a short walk to the river front, lots of activities and just a really clean beautiful park! Would definitely be staying here again! 🧡

This is a true holiday park, ideal for families, lots of activities and fun to be had. We had a nice spot next to the camp kitchen and the amenities, pool and resteraunt. Dog friendly and plenty of open ground for the zoomies. Everything was clean and well maintained and the staff were great, even a small shop with most things and a bit of booze.
Even though it wasn’t holidays there were plenty of kids, not really my favourite people but even the camp sites on the creek further away from the noise were almost the same price as the one we had. The Park certainly don’t miss opportunities to value add, almost every activity had a charge.
Great Caravan Park with lots of extra facilities

From the moment my family arrives until it's time to leave, the staff are all welcoming and friendly. Rivershore is our absolute favourite place to holiday and enjoy family time. We often enjoy day trips there too. The resort facilities are lovely and clean. Pool and restaurant are amazing. Highly recommend.
Loved the whole experience.  Great staff, location and facilities.

Honestly 1 of the best camp sites for all ages.
Lots of activities and things to do for everyone.
Lots of spaces and roads to bring, bikes,scooters and skateboards.

The restaurant offers amazing location and food.

Very good and clean campsite with also availability to book cabins. The utilities such as restaurant, pool, bar looks like you're in a resort. All staff were so friendly and helpful! I would go here again in a heartbeat.
They have live music here on the deck near the pool on Sunday afternoon 3:00 to 5:00 pm.

We had a great holiday. Everything is fantastic. The park facilities are extremely clean. There are many activities for kids & family. Staff are super friendly. Thanks so much Ingenia Rivershore team. We will come back and would definitely recommend this holiday park to everyone.

Lovely location along the river.
Wonderful pool for kids (big and small).
Staff were fantasic, made our stay easy and very enjoyable.

A great, clean park to camp at.  The glamping tents look awesome.  We just stayed in swags ourselves.   Pool was great for kids for was extremely packed with people as it was also open to the public to use ($20 entry fee which we felt a bit steep for one friend to swim with our daughter for an hour)  Maybe if it was just open to guests and their visitors not the entire public.
Facilities were very clean and nice.

But we will def be back, great affordable stay and family fun.

Thanks guys.
Leaving and entry to park( David low way) you really have to be patient
Nice place to stay with family , very clean and tidy, Live music and some staff was very friendly, in special Fabiane, was very helpful and gentle !
