Great caravan park! Proper camp kitchen as well as toilet blocks, spaced throughout the park so your site is never too far from amenities. Pool and waterslide are great, the kids loved it. The best part is the very generous  site size! The biggest site I've ever stated at, even with huge caravans on either side, we didn't feel cramped. Will definitely stay again next year.
We had a family get together weekend and although the weather was terrible, everyone had a ball. The only downside was the price for off-grid camping.

Well well well this place I did not expect to be so Great.. We spent a week everything was perfect hospitality service location kids loved the entertainment so much  bouncy pillow not same as others. Great for little kids though. The staff are allfi pleasant and amazing very helpful and friendly, we wanted to stay longer that's how much  they made us feel welcomed.
Last week we came in for a holiday here and this was a good place for people to stay. The rooms were good, people were nice & just off a main road. Were surely coming back again.

Stayed in the Safari Tent, lovely room, great resort facilities. I left my handbag at the restaurant when I got my cab to the airport and the staff got the maintenance guy to rush it to the airport for me and I just made my flight! The staff went above and beyond to help me and I really appreciate it, thank you to all!
Rusty and all the staff were amazing. Definitely recommend. We will be coming back
Excelet Spot for Camping with great facilities, clean, and services.
Great park. Great facilities. Regularly cleaned. Smallish sites but the park is very well maintained!
Perfect stay. Location ideal. Staff so helpful. Great idea with different food trucks for access for dinner. Highly recommend
Come here most days for coffee in the cafe as we live close by. Great coffee and food.

Stayed in a Carven (named Bambi) for the weekend, besides the weather, it was a wonderful time, staff are friendly and respond to any enquires quickly.

i was abit to tall for the bed, otherwise the Carven itself was nice and cozy.
Over priced at $95 for a powered site.
Brilliant..
Great spot for families
staff amazing better than Bunnings very clean & everybody so happy the pool is amazing we`ll be back that`s for sure. i even got to sing a song through PA,
Best family holiday we have every had. It was relaxing and so much fun. The safari tents were incredible. We will definitely be back every year.

Absolutely could not recommend this Holiday resort enough! So much so, that when we had a bad experience in Bundaberg after leaving this resort the day before, they were so accommodating to fit us in with one night's notice. The kids loved the pool, playground, holiday activities and the amenities were always clean and tidy. Will definitely be returning in the future!
The best park you will ever visit.
Great place for kids parties and adults to sit back and relax whilst being able to watch kids at all times... Bonus... Has a bar and great little restaurant.
Very friendly and clean
We really enjoyed this resort style caravan site. It really felt like a resort with the pool and restaurant. The reception staff were extremely accommodating and friendly. I can’t wait to return.

We were upgraded to a King Safari Tent & was one of the most pleasant experiences ever had. Not only that but the whole venue exceeded expectations & all the staff were absolutely fabulous, friendly, knowledgeable & so helpful. Thank You for making our short stay so enjoyable, we will be back for longer & bring more of our family to enjoy.
Beautiful place fir the whole family. We loved our 2 night stay. The staff will make sure to help you. Will surely come back

Extreme traffic noise!!! We stayed in the tent area unpowered, 100 metres away from a very busy road . Traffic noise all night!!! I could only sleep for an hour and we left early in the morning, canceled the second night .Terrible experience. Yes it’s next to river. Yes there is a fire pit. But that traffic noise destroyed all the beauty.
A wonderful park, great location, great facilities and lovely staff.
Beautiful park! Friendly staff that are always wanting to help you :)

We just spent the weekend at Rivershore celebrating our Son's 18th. Shane and his team go above and beyond. Special thanks to Rebecca and the bar team for taking such great care of our party it is greatly appreciated. The food was delicious and well presented too. This is the second birthday party we have held at Rivershore and will definitely be back soon.
great park. spacious caravan sites, good clean amenities and friendly staff
Lovely place with plenty of room on sites. Abit expensive. For dogs they should have a dog run seeing they have so much space
Very good campsite! The staff are so kindly and the pool is warm. You can fishing in the river close to the campsite.

We stayed in the safari tents and what a surprise they were!
All the comforts of home without compromise!

I originally booked 2 nights in the safari tent, I loved it that much I booked another night. I didn’t want to leave! The accommodation was wonderful. So clean, comfy bed, the bath was lovely, river view, the staff so helpful and friendly. Having a morning coffee at the food area was lovely. Wish I could stay longer. I’ll definitely be back again.

Great camp/caravan park. Right on the river and has lots to keep the kids entertained. Great pool with slides, good mini golf, great restaurant and very clean amenities. Would recommend and wish we stayed longer!
Great place
Great tents for glancing, very clean park with nice staff we have liased with.

Great spacious dog friendly park. We will be back. Cafe and restaurant lovely. Amenities spotless.thanks for having us.
Gail Denis and Poppy

What a great spot! A proper resort... for campers! We loved our stay. Sites were very generous in space, park was beautiful and so much to do, especially for the kids. Activities on all the time. Really enjoyed such a beautiful spot and not far from beaches and other attractions.

After getting over the price of an unpowered site, it is very difficult to fault this caravan park. The location of the unpowered sites was worth every cent. Will be back, caught a decent bream but am assured fishing into the night might land a jewfish.
Beautiful swimming pool, friendly staff. Lovely glamping tents. Really lovely place to stay

Had a great family holiday.
Definitely coming back again
Lovely facilities spacious and clean. Big unpowered site on the river. Ripped off at $80 per night but it was all that was left in the area. Purchased some of their fire wood which was trash
Good Service & Friendly Staff. It's centrally located for most major attractions. Definitely come back soon.
Excellent park for our family of 5. Plenty of activities, fun play areas and fishing.
We had a great time here. Service was amazing and the facilities were brilliant to.

We had a wonderful first glamping experience. The tents are beautiful and cozy. The heated pool was a hit with the kids and the food and drinks went down well with the adults. We will definitely stay again and can't recommend Rivershore enough.
Nice setting lots of kid’s activities but pricey

Camping here is great, very family fun friendly. We had 3 powered sites which fit 21 of us ( kids and adults) with room to spare. You can get meals here that are restaurant quality, the kids swim for free / its included in the entry.

Show strenght is amazing, drainage is a bit of an issue but still rate it
We had a lovely stay camping (tent) at Rivershore. All the staff were pleasant and helpful. Facilities were outstanding- very clean.

Absolutely brilliant from making the booking to our stay.
Staff amazing, park is spotless and has everything you could want including a fantastic meal delivered to our site and as for That Pizza Guy ❤️❤️
I would highly recommend this park
Good place to stay, clean and tidy.

Loved our stay here. Very clean, lots of things to do, large sites, well priced. Can't really walk anywhere from here, but there is plenty to do at the park without leaving the park for a weekend. Short drive to the beach. We will stay again.

Very nice place to stay,play,fish and food truck for dinner so much to do. Highly recommend. Caravan spots are great size amenities are all great and clean. Toilets nice and clean females toilets have hair-dryers. Laundry has coins and also has card so perfect if you don't have the coins. So much space for thr kids to run around and nice area for fishing and also ramp for boat or jetski. This place has it all. Fire pit available so the little ones can put there marshmallows on and have a great night with others.

From the time I contacted to make a booking I was made feel very welcomed.  The park was very clean as were the amenities.  The staff were all very friendly and helpful.  The food was delicious from the restaurant. It was a very friendly family park for children. Pool area was very inviting.

Wonderful holiday resort. The staff is absolutely amazing and so friendly. There are so many activities for the whole family. The waterside and pool area was so much fun and a very generous size. Loved the cabanas for relaxing and the pool side service. The food is incredible. I loved the salmon eggs benedict. We had several dishes throughout our stay, and every dish from the pizza and wings to the eggs benadict was delicious. We stayed in a glammping tent, and it was amazing (more like a home away from home) it took camping to a whole new level. Nice deep soaker tub and shower in the bathroom. They have a  restraunt on site that you can order food straight to your site or glamping tent for delivery or to the poolside or dine in. They also make some nice cocktails. The amenities included a pool and waterslides, jumping pillow, pedal trikes, mini golf, laundry, showers, 2 large bonfire pits, kids' movie nights, scavenger hunts, colouring contests, and more.

We recently stayed here with our van and had the ultimate spot right in front of the pool. The amenities are clean and the grounds are kept in immaculate condition. For those with vans the sites are quite large compared to other parks in the area and the staff are more than happy to assist. The park has plenty of room away from the vans and sites to kick a ball or ride a bike or even cast a line in.

We ate at the restaurant a few times and the food was delicious and reasonably priced. Each night had a theme and on the weekends there was even bingo and other games.

A great park and one which we have already booked to return to again.

Fabulous weekend here camping with kids. Kids loved the great pool, slides, water play pool, go-carts, mini golf and huge jumping mat. Adults loved the great service, spotless facilities, camp kitchens, cafe, bar and live music on weekend afternoons. Would definitely recommend!

We had a fantastic family holiday at Ingenia Rivershore. The staff were a pleasure to talk to at every stage of our stay, making us feel really at home. We enjoyed the amenities and location and were able to truly relax. Something for everyone in the family. Food and drinks at the restaurant were good quality.
Dog friendly by the river lovely place to stay .  Totally recommend Ingenia Hoildays Park.
Great place good friendly staff and good for kids. You have ever thing there

What a fantastic place to stay! They gor us in last minute on a Saturday night no hassle at all going to stay 1 night we stayed 5 and would have loved to stay longer but had to head off. So much to do for the kids the great heated pool and weekend activities. Loved having daily happy hour and meals by the pool so easy to watch the kids play and relax. Afternoon fish in the river and beautiful clean park and amenities.
Thank you so much to the friendly staff what a great stay we had truly able to relax and enjoy our stay.

Very friendly and efficient staff. Very very clean, both the onsite accommodation, the amenities and the grounds. They have a lovely cafe, bar, restaurant but also different food trucks visit on different nights, there was an outdoor movie and two fire pits, plus it backs on to a river and it is dog friendly there is an a large area at the back to walk, run with dogs. The pool area is fantastic and heated to 25 degrees if your staying in winter.
